page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Lighter is a kmer-based error correction method for whole genome sequencing data.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Lighter is a kmer-based error correction method for whole genome sequencing data
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Kmer-based error correction method for whole genome sequencing data. Lighter uses sampling (rather than counting) to obtain a set of kmers that are likely from the genome. Using this information, Lighter can correct the reads containing sequence errors.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Kmer-based error correction method for whole genome sequencing data. Lighter uses sampling (rather than counting) to obtain a set of kmers that are likely from the genome. Using this information, Lighter can correct the reads containing sequence errors.
